since_last: 35% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.96%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +2.11% · Gold -0.04% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 35% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.96%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.96%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.94%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at +6.97%
cards.body: Leaders: DV +6.97%, MU +4.96%, SMCI +3.69%, INTC +3.40%, VRT +2.88%. Laggards: SPCX -4.72%, SAP -2.71%, APP -2.45%, CRNC -2.04%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.72% at $176.26
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.72% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
